name: CRUD Transfer Stok - Tambah, Filter Gudang, Filter Tanggal, Detail, Hapus
description: Test CRUD transfer stok antar gudang: buat transfer baru, filter gudang asal/tujuan, filter tanggal, lihat detail, hapus draft. Login admin.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
User is redirected to dashboard
Click Transfer Stok menu in the sidebar
Transfer Stok page is visible with transaction list
Click the Buat Transfer button
Create transfer stock form or modal is open
Select source warehouse (Dari Gudang) from the Dari Gudang dropdown
Select destination warehouse (Ke Gudang) from the Ke Gudang dropdown
Click the Tambah Baris button to add an item row
Select a product from the first -- Pilih Barang -- dropdown in the table
Fill the quantity input in the table with 2
Click the Simpan Draft button
New transfer transaction appears in the table with Draft status
Click the detail or view button on the newly created transfer row
Detail modal is shown
Close the detail modal
Click the delete or trash icon on the newly created draft transfer row
Confirmation dialog appears
Confirm the deletion
The transfer is removed from the list
